name: Silver Spring Towers
bathroomsNote: All unit types (studio, 1BR, 2BR) have 1 bathroom only

notes.petDetail: Cats only per Southern Management official features page; $25/mo cat rent. Third-party listings conflict but operator site controls.
notes.laundryDetail: 24-hour laundry rooms on each floor (shared); no in-unit washer/dryer. Residents pay per use.
notes.balconyDetail: One aggregator (ApartmentList) lists patio/balcony; official site and RentCafe are silent. Marked Unclear.
notes.packageDetail: No dedicated package room listed. 24-hour concierge handles package receipt per resident review. Marked Unclear for a dedicated room.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Management praised as responsive (VeryApt 8.2/10 overall). At least one reviewer called the building 'dated' (built 1966) and noted occasional false fire alarms from gas heating.
notes.doormanDetail: '24-Hour Concierge Service' stated on Southern Management and RentCafe. Search result quotes: 'each of the two buildings has 24 hour door staff' and 'concierge 24h picking up packages.'
notes.elevatorDetail: Confirmed: 15-story tower; elevator listed in VeryApt amenities.
notes.climateDetail: Central A/C listed as in-unit apartment feature on RentCafe. Unit thermostat control not explicitly confirmed.
